description_long: This tram is a rectangular, modern public transport vehicle with a predominantly white exterior and large, evenly spaced windows along its sides. It features a single-arm pantograph mounted on the roof, connecting to overhead wires for electric power. The tram rides on a set of small wheels and is situated on a pair of embedded tracks, with a flat, gray platform beneath. The roof has two brown grilles or vents, likely for ventilation or air conditioning. The doors are flush with the body and appear to be sliding, positioned on the right side of the tram. The overall design is streamlined and functional, with minimal external ornamentation.
description: A modern white tram with large side windows, a single-arm pantograph, and sliding doors on the right side, set on embedded tracks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tram's large windows, sliding doors, and the single-arm pantograph extending to overhead wires.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the tram's flat face, central windows, and the pantograph attachment on the roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with visible windows and pantograph, but no doors on this side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tram's back windows, taillights, and the continuation of the roof-mounted pantograph.
attribute_door_configuration: two sliding doors on the right side, evenly spaced
attribute_window_arrangement: five large rectangular windows per side, evenly spaced with narrow vertical dividers, continuous band appearance
